scenarios.description: children() rebuilds cache when existing WeakReference has been cleared (shadowChildrenRef.get()==null)
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child; first call to children() to build cache; shadowChildrenRef cleared via reflection
scenarios.expectedResult: Returns new Elements list containing the single child element
pseudocode: TEST TC06 children rebuild on GC-cleared cache
// simulate GC clearing of weak reference

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds cache after mutation via prependChild (cache invalidation on nodelistChanged)
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child and cached children list built
scenarios.expectedResult: Returns a fresh Elements instance with children in new order (newly prepended first)
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children rebuild after prependChild

scenarios.description: children() filters out non-Element nodes and only returns actual Element children
scenarios.precondition: Element with one TextNode and one child Element appended
scenarios.expectedResult: Returns Elements list containing only the Element node, ignoring text nodes
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children ignores non-Element nodes
